violations.text: The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - upper shelves and prep tables located in the chicken flouring station area - plastic wrap case New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The floors throughout (including walk-in freezer) and walls behind fryer area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The (ceiling) in the (dining room) area is in poor repair. Observed leak coming from ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in back storage area and storage shelves in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to increase PCS to 2x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Inspector observed dead rodent in back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Inspector observed a leak at a valve located on side of the washing compartment of 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1.threshold to walk in freezer area has exposed and cracked concrete/cement). 2.leak observed coming from a hole in ceiling. 3.hole in wall in dry storage area. 4.missing hook for spray hose at utility sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The floors in the walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
